calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Apr-11-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances; Travis Neal appearing via zoom for and with (executor) Rosemary Bergin appearing via zoom.

The Court noted that the stipulation filed with the Court last week didn't include the attached Exhibit as noted in the stipulation. Mr. Neal reports the exhibit is the order that was lodged with the Court in February. The Court acknowledges that there appears to be no objections to the fees being requested. Mr. Neal reports to the Court regarding notices to the beneficiaries as to the work performed on the real property. The Court advised that it intends to update the proposed order to allow payment of extraordinary fees. Mr. Neal advised that he is amenable to the Courts tentative ruling.

The matter is submitted.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Ateesh Datt. Deputy: Choi. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar May-02-2022 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Nov-02-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ava Reich, Beneficiary (appearing by video conference).

At the Court's invitation, Ms. Reich reports on the reasons for her appearance, noting her status as the spouse of the decedent and that she is in possession of various documents ostensibly evidencing the decedent's intent to draft and execute a new will. The Court notes that, at this time, it would need a stated objection to the admission of the will, whereupon the Court would continue the hearing to allow Ms. Reich to retain counsel and file written objection. Ms. Reich queries the Court as to what options might be available to her, upon which the Court is unable to opine. After further discussion, Ms. Reich affirmatively declines to object to the current Petition and admission of the Will.

Noting Ms. Reich appearance and stated non-opposition, the Court admits into probate the Will dated December 31, 2004, appoints Rosemary Bergin the Administrator the subject estate with full authority and notes that pursuant to the terms of the Will, no bond is required. The Court sets May 2, 2022 for status of closing the estate.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Court Examiner: Sandra Hilton. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Reporter: Not Reported. (D204)
